name: solution-delivery-loop
description: A compact, agent-neutral skill family for solution delivery

interface.longDescription: A compact, agent-neutral skill family for solution delivery. Covers the full lifecycle from request triage through requirements, design, implementation, verification, and acceptance. 8 skills: solution-delivery-loop, requirement-discovery, solution-design, implementation-execution, delivery-acceptance, review-feedback, process-distillation, structured-investigation.
defaultPrompt: Implement this feature end-to-end from requirements to verified delivery
Review this completed work and decide whether it's ready to ship
Investigate this bug report and trace the root cause through the codebase
